heading_content_part: PrivacyThis privacy policy covers the use of the 'Ringtone Maker', 'Ringpod' and 'Lite Player' applications.It may not be applicable to other software produced or released by Big Bang Inc.Big Bang Inc does not collect any personal
usage analytics by Google Firebase SDK, these data only used for APP improvement.    APP also has
Admob SDK for playing AD. It may collect some statistic, but Big Bang Inc does not have access to any information stored within.
